query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "your unembedding matrix is secretly a feature lens for text embeddings" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology paper for the specific technique of "unembedding" analysis (via the "Reward Lens" adaptation) and criterion (a) by providing mechanistic evidence on the same core construct (the relationship between model weights and feature representations) that the user's referenced work investigates, even though it applies it to reward models rather than generative text embeddings.
